title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: A video explainer covering agent harness engineering, its relationship to prompt and context engineering, and the architectural patterns that emerged in agentic AI systems. The piece positions harness engineering as a distinct discipline that evolved from earlier prompt and context engineering approaches.
